cards.title: Program A
cards.description: An intensive course for rapid personal growth and new skills.

cards.title: Program B
cards.description: Mentoring and community for long-term professional development.

program-a.title: What is Program A
program-a.description: Program A is an intensive program designed for university students and junior professionals who want to quickly gain practical experience, work in teams, and receive mentoring from experienced professionals.

benefits.title: 3 months
benefits.description: Intensive program with weekly mentoring and workshops.

benefits.title: Team work
benefits.description: You work in a multidisciplinary team with your own ideas.

benefits.title: Real projects
benefits.description: You develop real challenges with community impact.

signup_students.title: Category: Students
list: Basic knowledge of at least one technology
Ability to dedicate 15-20 hours per week

signup_juniors.title: Category: Junior/Entry-level
list: Up to 2 years of work experience
Willingness to dedicate time to the program

questions.question: How much does Program A cost?
questions.answer: Program A is completely free. All participants get equal access to mentors, workshops and materials, without hidden fees.

questions.question: Do you need work experience outside of school?
questions.answer: No, it's not mandatory! Most of our participants don't have work experience. What's important is having the will to learn and collaborate with the team.

cta.title: Ready for the challenge?
cta.description: Signing up for Program A is simple. I just need basic information and your motivation.

program-b.title: What is Program B
program-b.description: Program B connects companies with talented students and juniors who solve real technical challenges. Your company gets innovative solutions, while students gain practical experience and mentoring from professionals.

benefits.title: Innovative solutions
benefits.description: Students bring a fresh perspective to your technical problems.

benefits.title: Flexible engagement
benefits.description: You decide how strongly you want to engage and mentor students.

benefits.title: No hidden costs
benefits.description: The program is free for both parties - companies and students.

how_it_works_items.title: Company registration
how_it_works_items.description: Register your company profile and identify your team needs and technical challenges to solve.

how_it_works_items.title: Challenge creation
how_it_works_items.description: Define your challenge - what needs to be solved, what are the final goals, and what students are ideal.

how_it_works_items.title: Team selection
how_it_works_items.description: Browse registered teams and choose the best fit for your challenge.

how_it_works_items.title: Implementation & mentoring
how_it_works_items.description: The selected team starts development with your feedback and mentoring.

how_it_works_items.title: Presentation & deployment
how_it_works_items.description: The team presents the final solution and it can be deployed or further developed.

program-b.requirements_header: What do we need from your company?
program-b.requirements_tip: The more precise your challenge, the better teams you will attract.

questions.question: How much will it cost?
questions.answer: Program B is completely free for companies.

questions.question: How long does the program last?

cta.title: Want to cooperate with us?
cta.description: Register your company and define your challenge. Our students are ready!

hero.title: Our partners and mentors
hero.description: Meet companies and experts who support talent and help build trust in our community.

mentors.title: Mentors
mentors.subtitle: People who will push you forward

hero.title: Challenges and deadlines
hero.subtitle: Browse available challenges and join the ones that inspire you

empty.title: No challenges available yet
empty.description: Check back later. New challenges will be added soon.

page.title: Contact us
page.subtitle: Have questions about NTI programs or cooperation? Get in touch with us.

about_nti.title: About NTI
about_nti.description: The Nitra Technology Incubator is a reliable institution supporting innovation and technological development. We build an ecosystem of collaboration between faculties, companies, and startups.

cards.title: Mission
cards.description: We support innovation, education, and sustainable technological development in the region.

cards.title: Pillars
cards.description: Expertise, transparency, and collaboration form the foundation of our credibility.

cards.title: Ecosystem
cards.description: We connect faculties, startups, and companies to create real innovations and impactful projects.

cards.title: Faculties
cards.description: We collaborate with faculties and academic partners to bring new projects, research, and expertise into practice.

forgot.title: Forgot password

forgot.expires: The link is valid for 60 minutes
forgot.info: If you don't see the email, check spam or promotions.
